title: TXT 4 HELP - 211info
text: NATIONAL SAFE PLACE TXT 4 HELP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a confidential text-for-support service for youth in crisis. This service is intended to assist with issues revolving around abuse, bullying, family problems, depression, and/or suicidal thoughts. Counselors provide support via text messages. 545 South 2nd Street Louisville, KY 40202 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email 44357 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Text Short Code 44357 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Text "SAFE" and current location (address, city, or state) to "4HELP" (44357) for immediate assistance. Visit website or Text "SAFE" to "4HELP" (44357) to receive a message with the closest Safe Place location. For immediate help, reply with “2chat” to text interactively with a trained counselor. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Community Crime Prevention Programs Runaway/Homeless Youth Helplines Youth Issues Information Services If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NATIONAL SAFE PLACE
